name: quest-blackhole
description: WebXR (Meta Quest) gravitationally-lensed black hole — an Interstellar-style Gargantua flyby in the browser

scripts.starmap: node --max-old-space-size=4096 scripts/build-starmap.mjs --size 8192 --out public/assets/starmap_hyg_8k.png && node --max-old-space-size=2048 scripts/build-starmap.mjs --size 4096 --out public/assets/starmap_hyg_4k.png
